message: 🌱 Add prometheus: Add mechanism to perform bulk imports mission (#368)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "prometheus-535-add-mechanism-to-perform-bulk-imports",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "prometheus: Add mechanism to perform bulk imports",
+    "description": "Add mechanism to perform bulk imports. This issue affects 127+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify prometheus feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your prometheus deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=prometheus\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Add mechanism to perform bulk imports"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current resource configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant prometheus resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get resource -A\nkubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>\n```\nCurrently the only way to bulk-import data is a hacky one involving client-side timestamps and scrapes with multiple samples per time series. We should offer an API for bulk import. This relies on htt"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add mechanism to perform bulk imports",
+        "description": "Presently metricSorter is unstable because Less returns \"true\" instead of \"false\" when two metrics compare the same.  This means when Collectors emit timestamped metrics in order, this sort will perturb the ordering and result in metrics delivered out-of-order to Prometheus.  This PR fixes the return value for Less.\n\nSince we're going through the trouble of reordering metrics here anyway, explicitly sort by TimestampMs as well.\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Add mechanism to perform bulk imports is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: Presently metricSorter is unstable because Less returns \"true\" instead of \"false\" when two metrics compare the same.  This means when Collectors emit timestamped metrics in order, this sort will perturb the ordering and result in metrics delivered out-of-order to Prometheus.  This PR fixes the return value for Less.\n\nSince we're going through the trouble of reordering metrics here anyway, explicit. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
